## Summary
Describe the task outcome in 1-3 concise sentences.

Related tracker: #1
Supersedes: #<issue-number-if-applicable>
Aligned with: `<doc-or-spec-if-applicable>`

## Scope
- Define the concrete implementation/work items included in this task.
- Keep scope explicit and testable.
- Add or remove bullets as needed.

## Acceptance criteria
- State observable outcomes required for completion.
- Keep each criterion verifiable.
- Add or remove bullets as needed.

## Implementation checklist
- [ ] <optional step id> Implement core changes
- [ ] <optional step id> Add/update tests
- [ ] <optional step id> Update docs

## Notes
- Include constraints, exclusions, dependencies, or follow-up references.
